title: The eval() and query() Method Flow in Exploratory Data Analysis
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision process and complementary roles of the pandas eval() and query() methods for dynamic data filtering and computation.
elements: Need to filter rows based on a condition?
Need to perform a column operation or create a new column?
relationships: Start at DataFrame, then decide: if filtering rows, use query(); if performing columnar computation, use eval(). Each method leads to a new, transformed DataFrame object for further analysis.
